slice: Fail-closed validation and retention contract for credential-free public hostname probe evidence.
inputs_inspected: recent cloudflare commits and queue updates

verification.route: isolated Node 22-compatible runtime using byte-equivalent validator logic

claim_states.observed: The public hostname probe emitted classified JSON but no independent packet-coherence validator was present.
claim_states.inferred: Without a validator, malformed or internally contradictory packets could be retained as evidence.
claim_states.implemented: A deny-by-default validator now checks schema, canonical hostname/URL binding, DNS/HTTP coherence, classification-specific requirements, and identity.ok consistency.
claim_states.unresolved: The candidate hostname has not been proven reachable in this run, the workflow has not been observed executing, and Cloudflare control-plane credentials remain externally unconfigured.

authorized_scope: A structurally valid identity_verified packet may support public reachability and expected surface identity only.
limits: Structural validity does not prove observations were honestly collected.
Public reachability does not prove exact deployed commit or Cloudflare control-plane ownership.
No diagnosis or treatment claim is authorized.
No payment or conversion logic was moved to Vercel.
